content.rendered:
Study Abroad

Study in Canada

Get a Consultation
Download Brochure
Study in Canada

why studying in the Canada is so appealing​

Studying in Canada offers a unique blend of exceptional education, diverse cultural experiences, and a high quality of life. With a globally recognized education system, Canada has become one of the most sought-after destinations for international students, providing outstanding academic opportunities from elementary school to post-secondary studies.

Globally Recognized Education System

Canadian schools and universities are renowned for their high academic standards and innovative teaching methods, ensuring students receive a world-class education that is respected worldwide.

Postgraduate Work Opportunities

Many international students who complete a program in Canada are eligible for a Postgraduate Work Permit (PGWP), allowing them to gain valuable work experience and contribute to Canada’s workforce.

Pathway to Permanent Residency

Former international students with a Canadian education and skilled work experience have a competitive edge when applying for permanent residence through programs like Express Entry and the Provincial Nominee Program (PNP). This makes Canada an attractive destination for those seeking long-term opportunities.

Student Direct Stream (SDS)

Introduced in 2018, the SDS offers a fast-track process for obtaining a study permit, making it easier and quicker for eligible students to begin their education journey in Canada.

Post-study work opportunities

or international students.

Get in Touch

Reach out now to embark on your journey to a new life overseas with the expert assistance of our committed immigration professionals

  • Building #22 Second Floor khayaban e Iqbal sector XX DHA Phase 3 Lahore
  • advisor.edu@forecastmigration.com
  • +92-3111-822226
